cards.name: Knight of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: practical, reliable, efficient, stoic, slow and steady, hard-working, committed, patient, conservative

cards.name: 10 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: family disputes, bankruptcy, debt, fleeting success, conflict over money, instability, breaking traditions

cards.name: 4 of Swords, reversed
cards.interpretation: recovery, awakening, re-entering world, release from isolation, restlessness, burnout
